key_evidence: Time magazine May 25 'Deepening Democratic Crisis' explainer — international framing of the three-event arc
DEM Party formal condemnation — cross-partisan domestic institutional response
Özel-led 6 km march toward Parliament from seized HQ
Nine Istanbul arrests Sunday morning re 2023 CHP congress (continuation of same prosecution arc)
No state lethal force, no mass-arrest of protesters, no Article 7 TEU mechanism fired
methodology_note: Per second-event-at-floor convention (Ruling 3, May 24): protest mobilization is societal response to already-scored institutional acts, not a new institutional event. No third-event apply absent categorically distinct trigger (lethal force, mass protester arrests, emergency declaration, formal CHP closure).
